Name: Average time from Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR to Request Payment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Total time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Request Payment in variants that include Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Minimum time for Request Payment in cases that previously experienced a Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average time it takes Request Payment to be done after Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR, grouped by case:Amount
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Total resolution time of Request Payment in the most frequent variant (Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE → Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION → Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR → Request Payment → Payment Handled)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Request Payment in variants containing Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average waiting time to the Request Payment following a re-submission after Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Elapsed time between Request Payment and Payment Handled compared to the elapsed time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time of Request Payment in domestic declarations versus pre-paid travel cost requests, as inferred from case attributes
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER to Request Payment in successful paths that avoided rejection
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Total time until Request Payment is performed in variants where Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurred at least once
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average time between Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER and the subsequent Request Payment in repaired traces
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Time from the last Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE (after any rejection) to Request Payment in cases originally rejected by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Cycle Time of Request Payment when preceded by Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER versus when not
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Total time it takes Request Payment to be done after the final approval step, distinguishing between paths with and without prior Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'
